# PuModal

## Intent

- modal dialog
- blocking confirmation
- focused overlay

## Prefer When

- Use for blocking decisions, confirmations, and focused short workflows.

## Avoid When

- Avoid for secondary side-panel workflows; use PuDrawer.

## Import

```ts
import { PuModal } from '@partner-up-dev/ui-web'
```

## Props

- `id`
- `open`
- `maxWidth`
- `title`
- `ariaLabel`
- `closeOnOverlay`
- `closeOnEscape`
- `lockScroll`

## Slots

- `default`
- `header`

## Events

- `close`

## Composition

- PuButton
- PuForm
- PuInlineNotice

## Story Variants

Story: `src/stories/overlay/PuModal.story.vue`

- Controlled
- Open State
- Custom Header

## Types

- No exported TypeScript types extracted.

## Caveats

- Uses required open plus close event; do not assume v-model:open.
- Provide a useful title or aria label for dialog context.

- `src/components/puModal/puModal.vue`
